theory.canonical_statement: ID 489 establishes the harmonic reinforcement between the electromagnetic vacuum and the mechanical 153,600 node lattice. By coupling the 17.2 kHz carrier to the elastic displacement, the system achieves a vibrating code that physically manifests extracted data. This coupling allows the user to perceive resonance as a vector stimulus. Mechanical Feedback: Engraving on the sphere ensures acoustic nodes stay aligned with vacuum vortices. Resonant Gain: Amplifies the Bridge Tunnel signal through constructive interference with normal modes.
